name: multi-year play-by-play column without year split should not group by year
description: Regression test: play-by-play columns with multi-year params but no year split should aggregate across all years in a single row per player, not create duplicate rows per year. Fixed bug where CTE incorrectly grouped by year when params.year existed but splits did not include year.
expected_query: with "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b" as materialized (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, SUM(epa) as passing_expected_points_added_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_REG_WEEK_19', '2023_REG_WEEK_20', '2023_REG_WEEK_21', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4', '2025_PRE_WEEK_1', '2025_PRE_WEEK_2', '2025_PRE_WEEK_3', '2025_PRE_WEEK_4', '2025_REG_WEEK_1', '2025_REG_WEEK_2', '2025_REG_WEEK_3', '2025_REG_WEEK_4', '2025_REG_WEEK_5', '2025_REG_WEEK_6', '2025_REG_WEEK_7', '2025_REG_WEEK_8', '2025_REG_WEEK_9', '2025_REG_WEEK_10', '2025_REG_WEEK_11', '2025_REG_WEEK_12', '2025_REG_WEEK_13', '2025_REG_WEEK_14', '2025_REG_WEEK_15', '2025_REG_WEEK_16', '2025_REG_WEEK_17', '2025_REG_WEEK_18', '2025_REG_WEEK_19', '2025_REG_WEEK_20', '2025_REG_WEEK_21', '2025_POST_WEEK_1', '2025_POST_WEEK_2', '2025_POST_WEEK_3', '2025_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) group by COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b"."passing_expected_points_added_from_plays" AS "passing_expected_points_added_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b" on "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('QB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t65ee6a1e35e034555f7fb8389d603f9b"."passing_expected_points_added_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
